description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these sandals from id are made for you. These fisherman style slip-ons are a great mix of classic styling and comfortable materials. Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a casual vibe. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Branding on the footbed with EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with deep vertical and horizontal grooves for better grip Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
